Video.summary: See how Western imperialism, the politics of oil, and the push for a Jewish state all set the stage for the 20th century.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Middle East in the 20th Century
Video.title: A Middle East Crossroads in the Year 1990

Image.alt: A Middle East Crossroads in the Year 1990
A Middle East Crossroads in the Year 1990
A Middle East Crossroads in the Year 1990

Video.summary: Look at how protests in Persia led to a new government. Then meet the Young Turks who wanted a united Turkey to supersede the Ottoman Empire.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Middle East in the 20th Century
Video.title: Constitutional Revolts in Persia and Turkey

Image.alt: Constitutional Revolts in Persia and Turkey
Constitutional Revolts in Persia and Turkey
Constitutional Revolts in Persia and Turkey

Image.alt: World War I and the Ottoman Empire's Fall
World War I and the Ottoman Empire's Fall
World War I and the Ottoman Empire's Fall

Video.summary: Study the fallout from World War I with a look at the Turkish War of Independence in 1919.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Middle East in the 20th Century
Video.title: Egyptian Revolution and Turkish Independence

Video.summary: Indigenous political aspirations and growing mutual antagonism set the stage for World War I.
Video.grandparentTitle: The United States and the Middle East: 1914 to 9/11
Video.title: A Meeting of Two Worlds

Video.summary: Examine Wilson's efforts to shape the postwar settlement in the Middle East.
Video.grandparentTitle: The United States and the Middle East: 1914 to 9/11
Video.title: Wilson & the Breakup of the Ottoman Empire

Image.alt: Wilson & the Breakup of the Ottoman Empire
Wilson & the Breakup of the Ottoman Empire

Video.summary: Take a look at American interest in the Middle East between the wars.
Video.grandparentTitle: The United States and the Middle East: 1914 to 9/11
Video.title: The Interwar Period

Video.summary: The entry of the United States into World War II altered Americans' conception of the Middle East.

Video.summary: Learn about different scholarly views of the historical Jesus.
Video.grandparentTitle: How Jesus Became God
Video.title: Jesus - The Man Who Became God

Image.alt: Jesus - The Man Who Became God
Jesus - The Man Who Became God
Jesus - The Man Who Became God

Video.summary: In the ancient world, there were many accounts of "divine" mortals. Explore ancient models of divine men.
Video.grandparentTitle: How Jesus Became God
Video.title: Greco-Roman Gods Who Became Human

Video.summary: Delve further into the interface between the human and the divine in pagan cultures.
Video.grandparentTitle: How Jesus Became God
Video.title: Humans as Gods in the Greco-Roman World

Image.alt: Humans as Gods in the Greco-Roman World
Humans as Gods in the Greco-Roman World
Humans as Gods in the Greco-Roman World

Video.summary: In Genesis and Exodus, explore conceptions of divine beings that appear in human form.
Video.grandparentTitle: How Jesus Became God
Video.title: Gods Who Were Human in Ancient Judaism

Image.alt: Gods Who Were Human in Ancient Judaism
Gods Who Were Human in Ancient Judaism
Gods Who Were Human in Ancient Judaism

Video.summary: Learn about the divine figure of the Son of Man, and the Jewish conception of a "second God".
Video.grandparentTitle: How Jesus Became God
Video.title: Ancient Jews Who Were Gods

Video.summary: Consider why the New Testament Gospels are the only useful early sources on the life of Jesus.
Video.grandparentTitle: How Jesus Became God
Video.title: The Life and Teachings of Jesus

Image.alt: The Life and Teachings of Jesus
The Life and Teachings of Jesus
The Life and Teachings of Jesus

Video.summary: Explore what Jesus said about himself.
Video.grandparentTitle: How Jesus Became God
Video.title: Did Jesus Think He Was God?

Image.alt: Did Jesus Think He Was God?
Did Jesus Think He Was God?
Did Jesus Think He Was God?

Video.summary: Regarding Jesus's final days, review the events that we know about.
Video.grandparentTitle: How Jesus Became God
Video.title: The Death of Jesus - Historical Certainties

Image.alt: The Death of Jesus - Historical Certainties
The Death of Jesus - Historical Certainties
The Death of Jesus - Historical Certainties

Video.summary: Address some of the basic facts about the New Testament.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of the Bible: The Making of the New Testament Canon
Video.title: The New Testament - An Overview

Video.summary: Explore issues that affect how we understand Paul\'s Epistles.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of the Bible: The Making of the New Testament Canon
Video.title: Paul - Our Earliest Christian Author

Video.summary: Look at some of the major teachings of Paul\'s Epistles.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of the Bible: The Making of the New Testament Canon
Video.title: The Pauline Epistles

Video.summary: Consider the problem of forgery in the ancient world.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of the Bible: The Making of the New Testament Canon
Video.title: The Problem of Pseudonymity

Video.summary: Look at the roots of the Gospel narratives in the oral tradition.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of the Bible: The Making of the New Testament Canon
Video.title: The Beginnings of the Gospel Traditions

Image.alt: The Beginnings of the Gospel Traditions
The Beginnings of the Gospel Traditions
The Beginnings of the Gospel Traditions

Video.summary: Examine the Gospels of Matthew, Mark, Luke, and John.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of the Bible: The Making of the New Testament Canon
Video.title: The Earliest Gospels

Video.summary: Why were some stories of Jesus excluded from the New Testament?
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of the Bible: The Making of the New Testament Canon
Video.title: The Other Gospels

Video.summary: Examine the Apocalypse of John, known as the Book of Revelation.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of the Bible: The Making of the New Testament Canon
Video.title: Apocalypticism and the Apocalypse of John

Image.alt: Apocalypticism and the Apocalypse of John
Apocalypticism and the Apocalypse of John
Apocalypticism and the Apocalypse of John

Video.summary: Observe how Genesis uses earlier traditions to make its case for the existence of God.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History and Archaeology of the Bible
Video.title: The World of Genesis

Video.summary: Explore the symbolism of the tower and pyramid in ancient architecture.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History and Archaeology of the Bible
Video.title: The Tower of Babel

Video.summary: Here, trace the life of Abraham, the iconic father of three faiths.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History and Archaeology of the Bible
Video.title: The Journeys of Abraham

Video.summary: Learn the extraordinary story of Joseph's bondage in Egypt, and his reversal of fortune.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History and Archaeology of the Bible
Video.title: Joseph in Egypt

Video.summary: Examine parallels between the history of ancient Egypt and the book of Exodus.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History and Archaeology of the Bible
Video.title: The Story of Moses

Video.summary: Follow the route of the Exodus, and study historical perspectives on the journey.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History and Archaeology of the Bible
Video.title: The Mystery of the Exodus

Video.summary: Note what archaeological evidence tells us about the heroic saga of Joshua's conquests.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History and Archaeology of the Bible
Video.title: The Settlement in the Promised Land

Image.alt: The Settlement in the Promised Land
The Settlement in the Promised Land
The Settlement in the Promised Land

Video.summary: Trace the transformation of the Israelite tribes into the beginnings of a nation.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History and Archaeology of the Bible
Video.title: The Rise of the Israelite Monarchy

Image.alt: The Rise of the Israelite Monarchy
The Rise of the Israelite Monarchy
The Rise of the Israelite Monarchy

Video.summary: Ponder the value of the historical study of Christianity for the past and future.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of Christianity: From the Disciples to the Dawn of the Reformation
Video.title: The Historical Study of Christianity

Video.summary: Investigate the culture of the Mediterranean world in which Christianity was born.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of Christianity: From the Disciples to the Dawn of the Reformation
Video.title: The First Cultural Context - Greece and Rome

Image.alt: The First Cultural Context - Greece and Rome
The First Cultural Context - Greece and Rome
The First Cultural Context - Greece and Rome

Video.summary: Examine the circumstances of Jewish life in ancient Palestine and the Diaspora.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of Christianity: From the Disciples to the Dawn of the Reformation
Video.title: The First Cultural Context - Judaism

Video.summary: Consider the resurrection as marking the birth of Christianity.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of Christianity: From the Disciples to the Dawn of the Reformation
Video.title: The Jesus Movement and the Birth of Christianity

Image.alt: The Jesus Movement and the Birth of Christianity
The Jesus Movement and the Birth of Christianity
The Jesus Movement and the Birth of Christianity

Video.summary: Investigate the broad adaptations Christianity made in a relatively short period.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of Christianity: From the Disciples to the Dawn of the Reformation
Video.title: Paul and Christianity's First Expansion

Video.summary: Note influences in early Christianity beyond the pivotal figures of Jesus and Paul.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of Christianity: From the Disciples to the Dawn of the Reformation
Video.title: The Diversity of Early Christianity

Video.summary: Study the evidence of early Christian persecution by the Jews.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of Christianity: From the Disciples to the Dawn of the Reformation
Video.title: The Unpopular Cult - Persecution

Video.summary: Investigate the phenomenon of martyrdom as the perfect form of discipleship.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of Christianity: From the Disciples to the Dawn of the Reformation
Video.title: Forms of Witness - Martyrdom and Apologetic
